query:
ALTER TABLE feedback 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS archived TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS archivedAt BIGINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS deletedAt BIGINT NULL;
